creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Jinsong Zhao <jszhao@yeah.net> -----

Date: Sun, 02 Jun 2013 19:46:53 +0800
From: Jinsong Zhao <jszhao@yeah.net>
To: hrs@FreeBSD.org
Cc: freebsd-ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/179185: texlive-base-20120701_6 conflicts with tex-formats-20120701

After deleting tex-formats-20120701, the upgrade of
texlive-base-20120701_6 succeeded. After then, manual of installation
of tex-formats-20120701 was also needed. It was easy.

----- End forwarded message -----
